No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (4.3) and develops critical analysis, independent research, and language skills (4.4, 4.7), essential for advanced learning and sustainable development.
evidence: 培養...分析論點及批判性閱讀的能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course explicitly examines 'identity politics' and 'multiculturalism' in Taiwan's history, directly relating to Target 10.2 on promoting social and political inclusion and reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to consumption or production patterns.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly focuses on 'democratization,' the role of the 'state' and 'citizens,' and 'Peace in the Taiwan Strait,' directly aligning with Targets 16.1 and 16.6.
evidence: 民主化と台湾化の現場

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course fosters an 'international perspective' by analyzing Japanese scholarship on Taiwan, indirectly contributing to international knowledge sharing and cooperation (Target 17.6).
